name: Red Shoes of Cruelty
description: Selena Revive Affix: enemies in your Terra take additional damage scaling with Movement Speed bonus, capped at 75%. Modelled at a representative +30%.

name: Fury's Onslaught
description: Berserker Rehan trait: Seething Spirit grants +78% player's own Damage (Lv.5).

name: Avatar Descent
description: Oracle Thea trait: up to +25% additional Damage to enemies in Divine Realm.

name: Arcanist · Full Mana
description: Class Legendary Medium talent: at full Mana, +10% Attack and Cast Speed (condition not modelled).

name: Magister · Spell Burst
description: Class Legendary Medium talent: skills cast by Spell Burst deal +8% additional On Hit Damage.

name: Elementalist · Channeled Cap
description: Class Legendary Medium talent: at max Channeled stacks, +8% additional Damage.
